scripts.prepare:web: mkdir -p dist/vendor/epubjs && cp index.html styles.css updates.css app.js config.js build-version.json manifest.webmanifest icon.svg sw.js sw-v2.js .nojekyll dist/ && cp vendor/epubjs/epub.min.js dist/vendor/epubjs/
scripts.native:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run native:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run native:sync && npx cap open ios
